description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a robust polymer stock and a detachable box magazine. The rifle has a full-length Picatinny rail along the top for mounting optics or accessories, and flip-up iron sights are installed at both the front and rear. The barrel is of standard length and ends with a flash hider, while the handguard is vented for heat dissipation and improved grip. The pistol grip is ergonomically shaped for comfort and control, and the trigger guard is slightly enlarged for gloved use. The overall design is compact and utilitarian, suitable for urban environments and close-quarters scenarios.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a polymer stock, detachable magazine, Picatinny rail, and flip-up iron sights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, flash hider, and narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, including the stock, magazine, Picatinny rail, and flip-up sights.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, pistol grip, and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the magazine, stock, and accessory rail.
